name: current_design
short_description: Set or get the current design.
full_help:
current_design

Description: 
Set or get the current design.

Syntax: 
current_design  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<design>]

Returns: 
design object

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<design>]  Name of current design to be set

Categories: 
SDC, XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
